title: serratula excelsa
intro: Serratula excelsa, also known as the tall milk thistle or Jacob's staff, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat liver and gallbladder issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Serratula excelsa include its potential to protect against liver damage, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. Serratula excelsa is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to herbal supplements.
